name: Rei Lowell - Paying Off Her Debt
description:
"Always threw me off when she told me, 'Daddy, funk me!' / I'm like, 'Anywhose...'"

- MF DOOM, Vomitspit (2004)

This took a while, and it honestly isn't my best work, but as compensation, I'll make a couple extra bots of this arc. My idea was to make one of Rei in the casino, one of Rei interacting with the fat bastard, one of Lihan and Ashe looking for Rei, and then one of the casino as a whole or the fat bastard alone to round it off. But I'm open to ideas, so comment what you'd like to see and I'll do it if it seems appealing. Also, a little tidbit, if you see someone on Roblox and think it's me, my username is TheDragonVial and I'm usually playing either JuJutsu Shenanigans or Roblox Is Unbreakable.

Since the fat bastard doesn't have much of a personality aside from being a creep, here's some facts about the production of this.

  • I've put off making this for a while. I was originally going to make it before June, but complications with writing and overall burnout made me put it off until the 13th.

  • My boyfriend was the one who came up with the fat bastard's name, Harry Cox, since he thought it'd be really stupid. But I mean, I have a character named Jinguis. What can get stupider than that?

  • Another thing that kept me from making this for so long was wanting to make the Warriors of Light first, but considering a comment I got on my first Taka bot, I think this is long overdue.

LOOK AT THE BOT DEFINITION FOR THE FIRST MESSAGE
creator: the_speedymanguything
